reviews.comment:
lamentablemente igual que hace años, no lo arreglaron o modernizaron, sigue igual, lastima pasa muchísima gente por ahí, le falta pintura mejorar instalaciones, el personal excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, just like years ago, they haven't fixed or modernized it; it's still the same. It's a shame because so many people pass by there. It needs painting and the facilities need improvement, but the staff is excellent.
